title: RNAqueous with No DNAse, DNA Removal by Acid Phenol:Chloroform
author: Dan Richter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.itbcein
materials: On ice, add more lysis buffer undetermined

steps.title: Place elution solution in a dry...
steps.instruction: Place elution solution in a dry bath at 70-80ºC undetermined, per pellet

steps.title: Place pellet in a 50 mL conical tube on ice
steps.instruction: Place pellet in a 50 mL conical tube on ice

steps.title: Add lysis buffer undetermined
steps.instruction: Add lysis buffer undetermined

steps.title: Pipette up and down 5 times to resuspend pellet
steps.instruction: Pipette up and down 5 times to resuspend pellet

steps.title: Pipette up and down 20 times to fully resuspend/lyse pellet
steps.instruction: Pipette up and down 20 times to fully resuspend/lyse pellet

steps.title: Transfer into two 1
steps.instruction: Transfer into two 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes on ice undetermined, each

steps.title: Take an aliquot from one Eppendorf...
steps.instruction: Take an aliquot from one Eppendorf tube and pipette onto a glass slide to check lysis undetermined, aliquot Keep the slide inside a petri dish to ensure the noxious smell is contained

steps.title: Immediately centrifuge both tubes at max...
steps.instruction: Immediately centrifuge both tubes at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 1ºC for 5 min to pellet unlysed bacteria 00:05:00

steps.title: During centrifugation, add cover slip to...
steps.instruction: During centrifugation, add cover slip to the glass slide and quickly confirm lysis using a microscope.

steps.title: If cells were lysed, transfer supernatant into two new 1
steps.instruction: If cells were lysed, transfer supernatant into two new 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes. Otherwise, continue with the same tubes.

steps.title: On ice, pass the lysate in...
steps.instruction: On ice, pass the lysate in each tube 5 times through a 25 gauge needle fitted to an RNAse-free 1 mL syringe. If the cells were not lysed, pass through the needle additional times, and re-check lysis before continuing.

steps.title: Add 64% EtOH at room temperature (RT) per tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Add 64% EtOH at room temperature (RT) per tube undetermined

steps.title: Mix thoroughly by inverting the tubes several times
steps.instruction: Mix thoroughly by inverting the tubes several times

steps.title: Transfer lysate/ethanol mixture from one of...
steps.instruction: Transfer lysate/ethanol mixture from one of the Eppendorf tubes to a single filter cartridge in a collection tube undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec or until the mixture is drawn through the filter 00:00:30

steps.title: Repeat steps 15-17 three additional times...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 15-17 three additional times until all of the lysate/ethanol mixture in both Eppendorf tubes has been drawn through the filter cartridge

steps.title: Add wash solution #1 undetermined
steps.instruction: Add wash solution #1 undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30

steps.title: Add wash solution #2/3 undetermined
steps.instruction: Add wash solution #2/3 undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 xg, RT, 30 sec 00:00:30

steps.title: Repeat steps 22-24
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 22-24

steps.title: Centrifuge an additional 30 sec at...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge an additional 30 sec at 15,000 x g to remove residual wash solution #2/3 00:00:30

steps.title: Place filter cartridge in a new collection tube
steps.instruction: Place filter cartridge in a new collection tube

steps.title: Pipette pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
steps.instruction: Pipette pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec 00:00:30
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec 00:00:30

steps.title: Pipette additional pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined
steps.instruction: Pipette additional pre-heated elution solution onto the filter undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 15,000 x g, 30 sec 00:00:30 The final volume of eluate should be ~45 uL

steps.title: Spec on NanoDrop and make a...
steps.instruction: Spec on NanoDrop and make a dilution at 1:5 (2 µl :8 µl) in a separate tube for PCR/Bioanalyzer undetermined, aliquot

steps.title: Take an aliquot of 1:5 dilution...
steps.instruction: Take an aliquot of 1:5 dilution from previous step and dilute to 1 ng/µL in a seperate tube (for Bioanalyzer) undetermined, aliquot

steps.title: Add water to bring volume to 400 µL undetermined, water
steps.instruction: Add water to bring volume to 400 µL undetermined, water

steps.title: Add 3 M sodium acetate at pH = 5
steps.instruction: Add 3 M sodium acetate at pH = 5.2 (final concentration = 0.3 M) undetermined, (1/10 volume)

steps.title: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4
steps.instruction: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4.5 undetermined, 2 volumes

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside the fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside the fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 4ºC for 2 min 00:02:00 Check for insoluble precipitate, indicating the presence of potassium salts > 20 mM.

steps.title: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined

steps.title: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4
steps.instruction: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4.5 undetermined, (2 volumes)

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 4ºC for 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined

steps.title: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4
steps.instruction: Add acid phenol:chloroform:isoamyl alcohol at pH = 4.5 undetermined, (2 volumes)

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 4ºC for 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined

steps.title: Add chlorofom:isoamyl alcohol undetermined, (2 volumes)
steps.instruction: Add chlorofom:isoamyl alcohol undetermined, (2 volumes)

steps.title: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously inside fume hood for 15 sec 00:00:15

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge at 4ºC for 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined
steps.instruction: Transfer the top/aqueous phase to a new tube undetermined

steps.title: Add GlycoBlue (final amount ~25 µg,...
steps.instruction: Add GlycoBlue (final amount ~25 µg, working stock 15 µg/µL) undetermined

steps.title: Add 100% EtOH undetermined, (2
steps.instruction: Add 100% EtOH undetermined, (2.5 volumes)

steps.title: Shake vigorously to mix
steps.instruction: Shake vigorously to mix

steps.title: Centrifuge at max speed in a...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed in a microcentrifuge for 10 min at 4ºC 00:10:00

steps.title: Decant ethanol then remove residual with pipette
steps.instruction: Decant ethanol then remove residual with pipette

steps.title: Wash with -20ºC 70% ethanol undetermined
steps.instruction: Wash with -20ºC 70% ethanol undetermined

steps.title: Centrifuge for 5 min at 4ºC 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 5 min at 4ºC 00:05:00

steps.title: Dry pellet and resuspend in water undetermined
steps.instruction: Dry pellet and resuspend in water undetermined

steps.title: Spec on NanoDrop and dilute RNA...
steps.instruction: Spec on NanoDrop and dilute RNA to 1 ng/µL in a separate tube (for Bioanalyzer) undetermined, aliquot
